sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ أَبِي الْأَخْبَارَ عَلَى هَاتِفِهِ الذَّكِيِّ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Moj otac svakog jutra čita vijesti na svom pametnom telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: My father reads the news on his smartphone every morning.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُفَضِّلُ الصُّحُفَ الرَّقْمِيَّةَ لِأَنَّهَا سَرِيعَةٌ وَمَجَّانِيَّةٌ.
sentences.translation: On preferira digitalne novine jer su brze i besplatne.
sentences.translationEn: He prefers digital newspapers because they are fast and free.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ مَصْدَرِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ مُشَارَكَتِهِ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Moramo provjeriti izvor vijesti prije nego što ih podijelimo s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: We must check the source of the news before sharing it with others.
